**Lakeville** is a [hamlet](/wiki/Hamlet_(New_York) "Hamlet (New York)") and [census-designated place](/wiki/Census-designated_place "Census-designated place") (CDP) in the town of [Livonia](/wiki/Livonia,_New_York "Livonia, New York"), [Livingston County](/wiki/Livingston_County,_New_York "Livingston County, New York"), [New York](/wiki/New_York_(state) "New York (state)"), United States. As of the [2020 census](/wiki/2020_United_States_census "2020 United States census"), Lakeville had a population of 694.[[3]](#cite_note-Census2020PLLede-3)

## Geography

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Lakeville,_New_York&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Geography")]

Lakeville is in northeastern Livingston County, in the northwestern part of the town of Livonia. It sits at the northern end of [Conesus Lake](/wiki/Conesus_Lake "Conesus Lake"), the westernmost of New York's [Finger Lakes](/wiki/Finger_Lakes "Finger Lakes"), where the lake flows out into [Conesus Creek](/wiki/Conesus_Creek "Conesus Creek"), a northward-flowing tributary of the [Genesee River](/wiki/Genesee_River "Genesee River"). Lakeville is bordered to the south by the [Conesus Lake CDP](/wiki/Conesus_Lake,_New_York "Conesus Lake, New York").

[U.S. Route 20A](/wiki/U.S._Route_20A_(New_York) "U.S. Route 20A (New York)") passes through the center of Lakeville, leading east 2 miles (3 km) to [Livonia village](/wiki/Livonia_(village),_New_York "Livonia (village), New York") and west 6 miles (10 km) to [Geneseo](/wiki/Geneseo_(village),_New_York "Geneseo (village), New York"), the Livingston [county seat](/wiki/County_seat "County seat"). [New York State Route 15](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_15 "New York State Route 15") also passes through the community, leading east to Livonia village with US 20A but turning north up Rochester Road to lead 2 miles (3 km) to [Interstate 390](/wiki/Interstate_390 "Interstate 390") and 23 miles (37 km) to [Rochester](/wiki/Rochester,_New_York "Rochester, New York").

According to the [U.S. Census Bureau](/wiki/U.S._Census_Bureau "U.S. Census Bureau"), the Lakeville CDP has an area of 0.66 square miles (1.7 km2), all land.[[4]](#cite_note-Gazetteer_2019-4)
